title: Revamped Shipwrecks
description: Shipwreck structures redesigned with jigsaw degradation stages, hundreds of unique combinations!
body:
**Revamped Shipwrecks** aims to make every shipwreck encountered unique; by splitting ships into 3 sections, then randomly picking each section from a diverse pool of both custom and familiar options. As a result, each Revamped Shipwreck has interesting new access points and requires different approaches to navigate!
Revamped Shipwrecks have vertical wrecks, which can be upward pointing or downward pointing.
Wreck debris can also generate surrounding shipwrecks, depending on how damaged the wreck is. They can even occasionally generate entire missing pieces disconnected from shorter variants!
Each vanilla shipwreck is still possible to randomly generate, but it's far more likely to encounter an entirely new experience. Revamped Shipwrecks also come in every woodtype used in vanilla.
The Revamped Shipwrecks mod does not modify loot tables, only where chests generate on ships. 
This datapack should be compatible with most world generation mods straight out of the box, but if there are any incompatibilities, please let us know on our Discord.
## Installation
Fabric ![Fabric logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c41e753fa6df49fa9c28e392d365db2a3e24c33d.png) 1. Download the [Fabric installer](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/). 2. Install a version of Fabric Loader compatible with the version of the mod you are using. 3. Locate your .minecraft directory. If there is a "mods" folder inside open it, otherwise create one and open it. 4. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and Revamped Shipwrecks and place their .jar files inside the mods folder. 5. Launch Minecraft with the newly created Fabric installation.
Forge ![Forge logo small](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2de7ea98259126c71fe193892a89df271f7aa43.jpeg) 1. Download and install a version of [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) compatible with the version of the mod you are using. 2. Locate your .minecraft directory. If there is a "mods" folder inside open it, otherwise create one and open it. 3. Download Revamped Shipwrecks and place the .jar file inside the mods folder. Launch Minecraft with the newly created Forge installation.
### Check out our other projects! Wabi-Sabi Structures Pale Formations Unwrecked Ships
